error.iconFolderNotFound: The {{- path}} folder was not found.

useIconic.title: Use iconic
useIconic.desc: Use iconic settings (if using my-svgs or other plugin that allow custom icons)

createFolder.title: Create lucide folder
createFolder.desc: As lucide icon doesn't exists in the vault, using it doesn't works natively by the plugin. In this case, the plugin will create the file to link it.

lucidePrefix.title: Lucide prefix
lucidePrefix.desc: The lucide file will be created in your icons folder. The prefix will be the subfolder name: {0}/{1}

hide.title: Hide
hide.desc: Hide the key in Properties (in Live Preview or reading mode). The key continue to be visible in source mode.

iconName.title: Icon Name - Name into frontmatter
iconName.desc: Icon will be in the form of "folder/name".

regex.title: Allow regex
regex.desc: Sometimes, you didn't want the inheritance of the icon (used with regex rules in Iconize).

settings.fileMenu: Add the command in the file menu
